response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep web/full-stack and some systems-level experience, but the role centers on hands-on modern C++ for industrial automation. His C++ exposure is limited and dated (a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project), with most recent work in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. He shows no evidence of MQTT, industrial protocols, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial-cybersecurity work, which are core to this position.
strengths: Extensive overall engineering experience across web, embedded, and desktop, exceeding the years-of-experience bar
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic maps to performance/concurrency needs
Strong quality mindset: TDD, testing tooling authorship, mentoring, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: Very limited and outdated professional C++/STL experience for a C++-centric role
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), or IEC 62443/SDL security background
Recent career trajectory is full-stack web/AI tooling, diverging from on-prem industrial platform development

key_factors.factor: Proven concurrency and high-performance systems experience
